description: During my internship at Globe Tech Fortune Industries, I was deeply involved in quality control, meticulously inspecting products, generating reports, and addressing defects. I also developed technical expertise in manufacturing processes and laser engraving, while honing key soft skills like team collaboration, problem-solving, and adaptability.
achievements: Meticulously inspected products to ensure they aligned with specifications, generating detailed reports and promptly addressing defects or rework requirements.
Gained practical experience with various quality control instruments and adhered to strict standards to ensure product quality and integrity.
Delved into the sophisticated intricacies of laser engraving, a pivotal process essential for imprinting precise product details crucial for customer identification and traceability.
Executed meticulous laser engraving procedures utilizing a laser beam to vaporize materials, demanding unwavering precision and unfaltering accuracy.

Fostered an environment of continuous improvement by collaborating effectively within a team, enhancing problem-solving and communication skills to drive positive outcomes and improve production efficiency.
